overview: A single-page marketing website for HaltSec Security Services LLC — a professional cybersecurity firm based in Ohio serving clients nationwide. The site features a hero section with the company logo, a services overview, an about section highlighting the team's expertise, and direct contact information. Fully optimized for SEO with structured data, Open Graph tags, and semantic HTML.
features: Single-page scrollable layout with smooth anchor navigation
Hero section with HaltSec logo and cybersecurity-themed graphics
Three core service sections: Vulnerability Assessment, Strategic Security Consulting, Security Awareness Training
SEO optimization with meta tags, structured data, and Open Graph tags
Fully responsive for mobile and desktop
